title: Stewed Tofu
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with tender tofu and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the carrot and potato, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the tofu and cook for 10 minutes, or until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
